3 ?0 + ?7 = ?07

Matching
3 ?07 1010011100 5

Constant
3 C 3 1111111111 a mismatch
3 C 3n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
3 I 0 1001010001 4 mismatch
3 I 0n 0110101110 6 mismatch

Unary 7
3 I 7 0011001101 5 mismatch
3 I 7n 1100110010 5 mismatch

Binary 07
3 AND 07 0001000001 2 mismatch
3 AND 07n 1110111110 8 mismatch
3 OR 07 1011011101 7 mismatch
3 OR 07n 0100100010 3 mismatch
3 XOR 07 1010011100 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
3 XOR 07n 0101100011 5 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07 1000010000 2 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07n 0111101111 8 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07 1101110011 7 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07n 0010001100 3 mismatch

Matched
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Extending defaults
3 1010011100 5
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0011001101 partial 0110101110 6
left 6
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 1001010001 partial 1100110010 5
right 5
Choosing left
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10011101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 1
1 I 5 = 1
2 I 6 = 0
3 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(1,1) = 0
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 0
6 I 3 = 1
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{11000011}
